sets.explain_zh: 参考语序(canonical，非唯一合法解)：The coach divided the players into two teams.
参考语序(canonical，非唯一合法解)：My aunt compared the new phone with her old one.
参考语序(canonical，非唯一合法解)：The teacher reminded the students of the deadline.
参考语序(canonical，非唯一合法解)：The waiter provided the guests with fresh towels.
参考语序(canonical，非唯一合法解)：The guide introduced the tourists to the old town.
参考语序(canonical，非唯一合法解)：The article attributed the delay to bad weather.
参考语序(canonical，非唯一合法解)：The committee transformed the empty hall into a library.
参考语序(canonical，非唯一合法解)：The manager congratulated the team on their success.
参考语序(canonical，非唯一合法解)：The farmer supplied the village with fresh milk.
参考语序(canonical，非唯一合法解)：The judge based her decision on the evidence.
